examples: "Winning the International Woolmark Prize gives us the opportunity to share what we do with a much bigger, global audience," said COTTWEILER after the win.
The Norman Ellison range includes Woolmark rated 100% pure New Zealand wool carpets, a selection crafted with Anti-Allergenic Yarn and the option of wool blend carpets.
Winner in 2008 of the same Woolmark Prize that five decades earlier helped to launch the career of two young designers that went on to great things: Karl Lagerfeld and Yves Saint Laurent.
